steps.title: Pin down the goal
steps.content: The student wants to indicate the size of the Pilot Knob NWR. The relevant note is: "It encompasses 90 acres." The correct choice must include that 90 acres figure.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
D is the only choice that mentions "90 acres" — it directly conveys the size. A focuses on management. B mentions the Indiana bat (not size). C also focuses on management.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
